topics.title: Radio Industry Decline and New Content
topics.summary: The studio discusses the decline of terrestrial radio as a business, Howard Stern's transition to satellite, and upcoming comedy content featuring Sam Simon.

topics.title: Artie Lang's Film Success and Media Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lang's film success, a comedy bit from Norm Macdonald's album, and his appearance on 60 Minutes.

topics.title: 60 Minutes Segment and Radio Negotiations
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production of a 60 Minutes segment featuring Howard Stern, the dynamics between co-hosts, and ongoing contract negotiations for Riley's return to the air.

topics.title: Hostel Altercation and Howie Mandel Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses a physical altercation involving Bubba, details of an upcoming premiere, and features an interview with Howie Mandel regarding his experiences on Deal or No Deal.

topics.title: Howie Mandel Discusses OCD and Deal or No
topics.summary: The studio features Howie Mandel discussing his experiences with obsessive-compulsive disorder, the production of his game show, and his career in stand-up comedy.

topics.title: Howie Mandel and OCD Rituals
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Howie Mandel's struggle with obsessive-compulsive disorder, specifically focusing on his refusal to remove a lucky string from his wrist.

topics.title: Pope Apology and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Pope's apology regarding remarks on Islam, Mario Lopez's dance background, Pete Townsend's controversial performance, and a humorous series of phone calls involving the host's mother.

topics.title: Film Reviews and Upcoming Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses a series of prank calls, an apology from a co-host regarding a past incident, the critical reception of a new comedy film, and the upcoming appearance of adult film star Jessica James.

topics.title: Beer League Movie Success and Relationship Reflections
topics.summary: The studio discusses the positive reception of the film "Beer League," a guest's experience with vehicle flooding, and personal reflections on recent breakups.

topics.title: Jessica James Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with adult film actress Jessica James, who discusses her transition from being a school teacher to her current career in the adult industry.

topics.title: Career Transition and Personal Life of Jessica James
topics.summary: The studio explores the guest's transition from teaching to adult modeling, her experiences with specific industry procedures like anal bleaching, and her professional collaborations.

topics.title: Body Piercings and Military Service
topics.summary: The studio features a guest with numerous body piercings and an Iraqi War veteran who discusses his experiences in the military.

topics.title: Jessica James Performance and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a performance by Jessica James followed by a discussion regarding the personal lives of celebrities like Jennifer Love Hewitt and Sarah Jessica Parker.

topics.title: Military Life and Iraq Deployment
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a soldier who discusses his experiences in the military, the challenges of being away from his family during deployment to Iraq, and the realities of life on the front lines.

topics.title: Military Experience and PTSD
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Sergeant Keith Manning regarding his experiences as a non-commissioned officer in Iraq, the psychological toll of combat, and his ongoing treatment for post-traumatic stress disorder.

topics.title: Military Experiences and Federal Investigations
topics.summary: The studio features a veteran recounting his experiences in Iraq and Vietnam while an FBI agent discusses federal investigations and the use of polygraph tests.

topics.title: Current Events and Pop Culture News
topics.summary: The show covers a wide range of topics including military rules of engagement, Dutch population statistics, the construction of the Freedom Tower, media ownership concerns, fashion industry regulations, health reports on chlamydia and spinach contamination, papal relations with the Muslim community, and various entertainment news.
